stardewcraft.tooltip.animal.name: Animal: %s
stardewcraft.animal.produce.inventory_fu: Inventory is full. Clear some slots first.
stardewcraft.animal.interact.inspect_req: Pet it first, then hold Shift + Right Click to inspect.
block.stardewcraft.mine_barrier.desc: A sealed barrier block for mine boundaries. Unbreakable in Survival (breakable in Creative).
block.stardewcraft.mine_exit.desc: Golden ladder leading to mine teleportation. Right-click to open travel menu.
stardewcraft.animal.query.move_unavailab: Move home is not available yet.
stardewcraft.animal.query.mood.neutral: Seems okay, but could use more care.
gui.stardew_craft.coop_manager.dialog.de: This will delete the building record.
Any still-bound animals will also be removed.
This building still has %s animal(s). Demolition is blocked.
gui.stardew_craft.coop_manager.dialog.re: Move this manager to a new place?
The manager becomes a relocation item.
Place it at a new valid and enclosed building.
While inactive: no auto-feed, night counts as outside.
gui.stardew_craft.coop_manager.confirm_w: Dangerous action: this affects building and animal data
gui.stardew_craft.barn_manager.dialog.de: This will delete the building record.
Any still-bound animals will also be removed.
This building still has %s animal(s). Demolition is blocked.
gui.stardew_craft.barn_manager.dialog.re: Move this manager to a new place?
The manager becomes a relocation item.
Place it at a new valid and enclosed building.
While inactive: no auto-feed, night counts as outside.
gui.stardew_craft.barn_manager.confirm_w: Dangerous action: this affects building and animal data
message.stardew_craft.manager.break_bloc: This building is not demolished yet. Manager cannot be broken directly.
message.stardew_craft.manager.demolish_h: This building still has animals (%s). Move or handle them before demolition.
message.stardew_craft.manager.relocate_p: Manager packed up. Place it at a new location and reactivate.
Building is now inactive: no auto-feeding, nighttime treated as outside.
message.stardew_craft.manager.relocate_o: This relocation manager does not belong to you.
message.stardewcraft.cannot_break_ladder: The mine ladder cannot be destroyed!
block.stardewcraft.mine_ladder.desc: A ladder leading to the next floor. Step on it to descend.
item.stardewcraft.copper_ore.desc: A common ore that can be smelted into bars.
item.stardewcraft.iron_ore.desc: A sturdy ore that can be smelted into bars.
item.stardewcraft.gold_ore.desc: A precious ore that can be smelted into bars.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_ore.desc: A rare ore that can be smelted into bars.
item.stardewcraft.coal.desc: A combustible rock that is useful for crafting and smelting.
item.stardewcraft.stone.desc: A common material with many uses in crafting and construction.
item.stardewcraft.battery_pack.desc: It's fully charged with precious energy.
item.stardewcraft.radioactive_ore.desc: It's glowing with dangerous energy... Can be smelted into bars.
item.stardewcraft.radioactive_bar.desc: Known by the Zuzu City Safety Commission to cause irreversible bodily harm.
item.stardewcraft.bouquet.desc: A gift that shows your romantic interest.
item.stardewcraft.wilted_bouquet.desc: A gift that shows you want to stop dating someone.
item.stardewcraft.geode.desc: A blacksmith can break it open for you. It might contain something rare.
item.stardewcraft.frozen_geode.desc: A blacksmith can break it open for you. It might contain something rare.
item.stardewcraft.magma_geode.desc: A blacksmith can break it open for you. It might contain something rare.
item.stardewcraft.omni_geode.desc: A blacksmith can break it open for you. It can contain a wide variety of minerals.
item.stardewcraft.quartz.desc: A clear crystal commonly found in caves and mines.
item.stardewcraft.earth_crystal.desc: A resinous substance found near the surface.
item.stardewcraft.frozen_tear.desc: A crystal fabled to be the frozen tears of a yeti.
item.stardewcraft.fire_quartz.desc: A glowing red crystal commonly found near hot lava.
item.stardewcraft.emerald.desc: A precious stone with a brilliant green color.
item.stardewcraft.ruby.desc: A precious stone that is sought after for its rich color and beautiful luster.
item.stardewcraft.topaz.desc: Fairly common but still prized for its beauty.
item.stardewcraft.prismatic_shard.desc: A very rare and powerful substance with unknown origins.
item.stardewcraft.tigerseye.desc: A stripe of shimmering gold gives this gem a warm luster.
item.stardewcraft.opal.desc: Its internal structure causes it to reflect a rainbow of light.
item.stardewcraft.fire_opal.desc: A rare variety of opal, named for its red spots.
item.stardewcraft.alamite.desc: Its distinctive fluorescence makes it a favorite among rock collectors.
item.stardewcraft.bixite.desc: A dark metallic Mineral sought after for its cubic structure.
item.stardewcraft.baryte.desc: The best specimens resemble a desert rose.
item.stardewcraft.calcite.desc: This yellow crystal is speckled with shimmering nodules.
item.stardewcraft.dolomite.desc: It can occur in coral reefs, often near an underwater volcano.
item.stardewcraft.esperite.desc: The crystals glow bright green when stimulated.
item.stardewcraft.fluorapatite.desc: Small amounts are found in human teeth.
item.stardewcraft.helvite.desc: It grows in a triangular column.
item.stardewcraft.jamborite.desc: The crystals are so tightly packed it almost looks fuzzy.
item.stardewcraft.jagoite.desc: A high volume of tiny crystals makes it very glittery.
item.stardewcraft.kyanite.desc: The geometric faces are as smooth as glass.
item.stardewcraft.lunarite.desc: The cratered white orbs form a tight cluster.
item.stardewcraft.malachite.desc: A popular ornamental stone, used in sculpture and to make green paint.
item.stardewcraft.neptunite.desc: A jet-black crystal that is unusually reflective.
item.stardewcraft.lemon_stone.desc: Some claim the powdered crystal is a dwarvish delicacy.
item.stardewcraft.nekoite.desc: The delicate shards form a tiny pink meadow.
item.stardewcraft.orpiment.desc: Despite its high toxicity, this Mineral is widely used in manufacturing and folk medicine.
item.stardewcraft.petrified_slime.desc: This little guy may be 100,000 years old.
item.stardewcraft.thunder_egg.desc: According to legend, angry thunder spirits would throw these stones at one another.
item.stardewcraft.ocean_stone.desc: An old legend claims these stones are the mosaics of ancient mermaids.
item.stardewcraft.ghost_crystal.desc: There is an aura of coldness around this crystal.
item.stardewcraft.jasper.desc: When polished, this stone becomes attractively luminous. Prized by ancient peoples for thousands of years.
item.stardewcraft.celestine.desc: Some early life forms had bones made from this.
item.stardewcraft.marble.desc: A very popular material for sculptures and construction.
item.stardewcraft.sandstone.desc: A common type of stone with red and brown striations.
item.stardewcraft.granite.desc: A speckled Mineral that is commonly used in construction.
item.stardewcraft.limestone_mineral.desc: A very common type of stone. It's not worth very much.
item.stardewcraft.soapstone.desc: Because of its relatively soft consistency, this stone is very popular for carving.
item.stardewcraft.hematite.desc: An iron-based Mineral with interesting magnetic properties.
item.stardewcraft.mudstone.desc: A fine-grained rock made from ancient clay or mud.
item.stardewcraft.obsidian.desc: A volcanic glass that forms when lava cools rapidly.
item.stardewcraft.slate.desc: It's extremely resistant to water, making it a good roofing material.
item.stardewcraft.fairy_stone.desc: An old miner's song suggests these are made from the bones of ancient fairies.
item.stardewcraft.fairy_dust.desc: Sprinkle on kegs, furnaces, and other refining equipment to instantly receive their product.
item.stardewcraft.star_shards.desc: No one knows how these form. Some scientists claim that the microscopic structure displays unnatural regularity.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_scroll_i.desc: A yellowed scroll of parchment filled with dwarven script. This one's tied with a red bow.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_scroll_ii.desc: A yellowed scroll of parchment filled with dwarven script. This one's tied with a green ribbon.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_scroll_iii.desc: A yellowed scroll of parchment filled with dwarven script. This one's tied with a blue rope.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_scroll_iv.desc: A yellowed scroll of parchment filled with dwarven script. This one's tied with a golden chain.
item.stardewcraft.chipped_amphora.desc: An ancient vessel made of ceramic material. Used to transport both dry and wet goods.
item.stardewcraft.arrowhead.desc: A crudely fashioned point used for hunting.
item.stardewcraft.ancient_doll.desc: An ancient doll covered in grime. This doll may have been used as a toy, a decoration, or a prop in some kind of ritual.
item.stardewcraft.elvish_jewelry.desc: Dirty but still beautiful. On the side is a flowing script thought by some to be the ancient language of the elves. No Elvish bones have ever been found.
item.stardewcraft.chewing_stick.desc: Ancient people chewed on these to keep their teeth clean.
item.stardewcraft.ornamental_fan.desc: This exquisite fan most likely belonged to a noblewoman. Historians believe that the valley was a popular sixth-era vacation spot for the wealthy.
item.stardewcraft.dinosaur_egg.desc: A giant dino egg... The entire shell is still intact!
item.stardewcraft.rare_disc.desc: A heavy black disc studded with peculiar red stones. When you hold it, you're overwhelmed with a feeling of dread.
item.stardewcraft.ancient_sword.desc: It's the remains of an ancient sword. Most of the blade has turned to rust, but the hilt is very finely crafted.
item.stardewcraft.rusty_spoon.desc: A plain old spoon, probably ten years old. Not very interesting.
item.stardewcraft.rusty_spur.desc: An old spur that was once attached to a cowboy's boot. People must have been raising animals in this area for many generations.
item.stardewcraft.rusty_cog.desc: A well preserved cog that must have been part of some ancient machine. This could be dwarven technology.
item.stardewcraft.chicken_statue.desc: It's a statue of a chicken on a bronze base. The ancient people of this area must have been very fond of chickens.
item.stardewcraft.ancient_seed.desc: It's a dry old seed from some ancient plant. By all appearances it's long since dead...
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_tool.desc: Some kind of gnarly old digging tool.
item.stardewcraft.autofeed_trough_upgrad: Right-click a normal feed trough to upgrade the entire connected line into auto feed troughs. Consumed on use.
item.stardewcraft.dried_starfish.desc: A starfish from the primordial ocean. It's an unusually pristine specimen!
item.stardewcraft.anchor.desc: It may have belonged to ancient pirates.
item.stardewcraft.glass_shards.desc: A mixture of glass shards smoothed by centuries of ocean surf. These could have belonged to an ancient mosaic or necklace.
item.stardewcraft.bone_flute.desc: It's a prehistoric wind instrument carved from an animal's bone. It produces an eerie tone.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_handaxe.de: One of the earliest tools employed by humans. This "crude" tool was created by striking one rock with another to form a sharp edge.
item.stardewcraft.dwarvish_helm.desc: It's one of the helmets commonly worn by dwarves. The thick metal plating protects them from falling debris and stalactites.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_gadget.desc: It's a piece of the advanced technology once known to the dwarves. It's still glowing and humming, but you're unable to understand how it works.
item.stardewcraft.ancient_drum.desc: It's a drum made from wood and animal skin. It has a low, reverberating tone.
item.stardewcraft.golden_mask.desc: A creepy golden mask probably used in an ancient magic ritual. A socket in the forehead contains a large purple gemstone.
item.stardewcraft.golden_relic.desc: It's a golden slab with hieroglyphs and pictures emblazoned onto the front.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_scapula.de: Commonly known as a "shoulder blade"... It's unclear what species it belonged to.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_tibia.desc: A thick and sturdy leg bone.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_skull.desc: This is definitely a mammalian skull.
item.stardewcraft.skeletal_hand.desc: It's a wonder all these ancient little pieces lasted so long.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_rib.desc: Little gouge marks on the side suggest that this rib was someone's dinner.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_vertebra.d: A segment of some prehistoric creature's spine.
item.stardewcraft.skeletal_tail.desc: It's pretty short for a tail.
item.stardewcraft.nautilus_fossil.desc: This must've washed up ages ago from an ancient coral reef.
item.stardewcraft.amphibian_fossil.desc: The relatively short hind legs suggest some kind of primordial toad.
item.stardewcraft.palm_fossil.desc: Palm Fossils are relatively common, but this happens to be a particularly well-preserved specimen.
item.stardewcraft.trilobite.desc: A long extinct relative of the crab.
item.stardewcraft.hay.desc: Dried grass used to feed barn and coop animals.
block.stardewcraft.coop_manager.desc: The core of a coop. Used to check coop status and manage daily care.
block.stardewcraft.barn_manager.desc: The core of a barn. Used to check barn status and manage daily care.
item.stardewcraft.wood_normal.desc: A sturdy, yet flexible plant material with a wide variety of uses.
item.stardewcraft.wood_hard.desc: A special kind of wood with superior strength and beauty.
item.stardewcraft.mixed_seeds.desc: There's a little bit of everything here. Plant them and see what grows!
item.stardewcraft.grass_starter.desc: Place this on your farm to plant a clump of grass.
item.stardewcraft.blue_grass_starter.des: Place this on your farm to plant a clump of blue grass.
block.stardewcraft.tapper.desc: Place it on a tree to produce artisan goods over time.
block.stardewcraft.keg.desc: Turns crops into wine, juice, or beverages.
block.stardewcraft.preserves_jar.desc: Turns crops and roe into jelly, pickles, and aged roe.
block.stardewcraft.dehydrator.desc: Turns fruit and mushrooms into dried goods.
block.stardewcraft.fish_smoker.desc: Turns fish into smoked fish with the help of coal.
block.stardewcraft.crystalarium.desc: Insert a gem or mineral to grow copies.
block.stardewcraft.furnace.desc: Smelts ores and minerals using coal.
block.stardewcraft.charcoal_kiln.desc: Turns 10 pieces of wood into one piece of coal.
block.stardewcraft.lightning_rod.desc: Captures lightning during storms and produces a Battery Pack the next day.
block.stardewcraft.solar_panel.desc: Produces a Battery Pack outdoors on sunny days.
block.stardewcraft.sprinkler.desc: Waters the 4 adjacent tiles every morning.
block.stardewcraft.quality_sprinkler.des: Waters the 8 surrounding tiles every morning.
block.stardewcraft.iridium_sprinkler.des: Waters the 24 surrounding tiles every morning.
block.stardewcraft.cask.desc: Use in the cellar to age products like wine and cheese.
block.stardewcraft.incubator.desc: Place an egg inside to incubate it.
block.stardewcraft.oil_maker.desc: Turns corn, sunflower seeds, and truffles into oil.
block.stardewcraft.feed_trough.desc: Stores hay for barn and coop feeding.
block.stardewcraft.autofeed_trough.desc: Stores hay and auto-refills. If empty and any player's silo has hay, it consumes 1 hay and refills itself.
block.stardewcraft.auto_grabber.desc: Placed inside a coop or barn, it automatically collects produce from that building.
block.stardewcraft.auto_petter.desc: Placed inside a coop or barn, it pets animals automatically each day.
block.stardewcraft.heater.desc: Works in coop or barn during Winter to keep animals warm.
block.stardewcraft.hay_hopper.desc: Pulls hay from your silos for manual feeding.
block.stardewcraft.bee_house.desc: Place outside and wait for delicious honey. (Except in Winter).
block.stardewcraft.crab_pot.desc: Place in the water, load with bait, and check the next day for a tasty catch. (Tip: Crab Pot produces various shellfish and trash. Different waters yield different catches!)
item.stardewcraft.oak_resin.desc: A sticky, fragrant substance derived from oak sap.
item.stardewcraft.maple_syrup.desc: A sweet syrup with a unique flavor.
item.stardewcraft.pine_tar.desc: A pungent substance derived from pine sap.
item.stardewcraft.mystic_syrup.desc: A very rare syrup that is said to have magic properties.
item.stardewcraft.honey.desc: It's a sweet syrup produced by bees.
item.stardewcraft.mead.desc: A fermented beverage made from honey. Drink in moderation.
item.stardewcraft.coffee.desc: It smells delicious. This is sure to give you a boost.
item.stardewcraft.acorn.desc: Can be planted to grow an oak tree.
item.stardewcraft.maple_seed.desc: Can be planted to grow a maple tree.
item.stardewcraft.pine_cone.desc: Can be planted to grow a pine tree.
item.stardewcraft.mahogany_seed.desc: Can be planted to grow a mahogany tree.
item.stardewcraft.mystic_tree_seed.desc: Can be planted to grow a special tree.
item.stardewcraft.basic_fertilizer.desc: Improves soil quality a little, increasing your chance to grow quality crops. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.quality_fertilizer.des: Improves soil quality, increasing your chance to grow quality crops. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.deluxe_fertilizer.desc: Greatly improves soil quality, increasing your chance to grow quality crops. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.basic_retaining_soil.d: This soil has a chance of staying watered overnight. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.quality_retaining_soil: This soil has a good chance of staying watered overnight. Mix into tilled soil.
This soil has 100% chance of staying watered overnight. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.speed_gro.desc: Stimulates leaf production. Guaranteed to increase growth rate by at least 10%. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.deluxe_speed_gro.desc: Stimulates leaf production. Guaranteed to increase growth rate by at least 25%. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.hyper_speed_gro.desc: Stimulates leaf production. Guaranteed to increase growth rate by at least 33%. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.tree_fertilizer.desc: Sprinkle on a wild tree to ensure rapid growth, even in winter. Does not affect fruit trees.
item.stardewcraft.parsnip.desc: A spring tuber closely related to the carrot.
item.stardewcraft.parsnip.flavor: It involves great nutrition and an earthy taste.
item.stardewcraft.parsnip_seeds.desc: Plant in spring. Takes 4 days to mature.
stardewcraft.emote.question: Question
stardewcraft.configuration.title: StardewCraft Configs
item.stardewcraft.iridium_rod.desc: Has one bait slot and one tackle slot.
item.stardewcraft.advanced_iridium_rod.d: Has one bait slot and two tackle slots.
item.stardewcraft.bait.desc: Makes fish bite faster. Must be attached to a fishing rod.
item.stardewcraft.magnet.desc: Increases the chance of finding treasures when fishing.
item.stardewcraft.wild_bait.desc: Sometimes helps you catch two fish at once.
item.stardewcraft.magic_bait.desc: Lets you catch fish from any season, time, or weather.
item.stardewcraft.deluxe_bait.desc: Makes fish bite faster and slightly increases the fishing bar size.
item.stardewcraft.challenge_bait.desc: Perfect catches yield more fish, but mistakes reduce the catch.
item.stardewcraft.spinner.desc: Slightly increases the bite rate when fishing.
item.stardewcraft.dressed_spinner.desc: Increases the bite rate when fishing.
item.stardewcraft.trap_bobber.desc: Fish escape slower when you aren't reeling them in.
item.stardewcraft.cork_bobber.desc: Slightly increases the size of your fishing bar.
item.stardewcraft.lead_bobber.desc: Prevents your fishing bar from bouncing at the bottom.
item.stardewcraft.treasure_hunter.desc: Fish don't escape while collecting treasures, and treasure chance is higher.
item.stardewcraft.barbed_hook.desc: Makes your fishing bar cling to your catch.
item.stardewcraft.curiosity_lure.desc: Increases your chance to catch rare fish.
item.stardewcraft.quality_bobber.desc: Improves the quality of fish you catch.
item.stardewcraft.sonar_bobber.desc: Shows what fish is on the line before it's caught.
stardewcraft.treasure.title: Treasure Chest
stardewcraft.treasure.golden.title: §6§lGolden Treasure Chest
stardewcraft.treasure.close_hint: Click or press ESC to take items
stardewcraft.fishing.not_water: That's not water; you can't cast there.
stardewcraft.fishing.minigame.title: Fishing
stardewcraft.fishing.minigame.hint: Hold Space/Use to raise the bobber
item.stardewcraft.watering_can.desc: Hold right-click to charge and water a larger area.
item.stardewcraft.scythe.desc: A tool for clearing weeds and harvesting certain crops.
item.stardewcraft.golden_scythe.desc: A stronger scythe with improved cutting efficiency.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_scythe.desc: A top-tier scythe with the highest cutting efficiency.
item.stardewcraft.shears.desc: Use this to collect wool from sheep.
item.stardewcraft.copper_watering_can.de: A sturdier watering can. Hold right-click to charge and water a larger area.
item.stardewcraft.steel_watering_can.des: An upgraded watering can. Hold right-click to charge and water a larger area.
item.stardewcraft.gold_watering_can.desc: A high-quality watering can. Hold right-click to charge and water a larger area.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_watering_can.d: The finest watering can. Hold right-click to charge and water a larger area.
item.stardewcraft.hoe.desc: Hold right-click to charge and till a larger area.
item.stardewcraft.copper_hoe.desc: A sturdier hoe. Hold right-click to charge and till a larger area.
item.stardewcraft.steel_hoe.desc: An upgraded hoe. Hold right-click to charge and till a larger area.
item.stardewcraft.gold_hoe.desc: A high-quality hoe. Hold right-click to charge and till a larger area.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_hoe.desc: The finest hoe. Hold right-click to charge and till a larger area.
item.stardewcraft.axe.desc: A basic axe. Used to chop trees.
item.stardewcraft.copper_axe.desc: A sturdier axe. Used to chop trees faster.
item.stardewcraft.steel_axe.desc: An upgraded axe. Used to chop tougher wood.
item.stardewcraft.gold_axe.desc: A high-quality axe. Used to chop trees quickly.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_axe.desc: The finest axe. Used to chop trees the fastest.
stardewcraft.message.player.exhausted: You're too exhausted to do that.
stardewcraft.hud.hay_silo_full: Silo is full. Hay dropped on the ground.
stardewcraft.command.museum.donate.inval: §cOnly StardewCraft minerals or artifacts can be donated with this debug command.
stardewcraft.tooltip.museum.gunther: Gunther can tell you more if you donate it to the museum.
stardewcraft.message.seed.wrong_season: This crop can't be planted this season.
item.stardewcraft.amaranth_seeds.desc: Plant in Fall. Takes 7 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.ancient_fruit_seeds.de: Plant in Spring or Summer or Fall. Takes 28 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.artichoke_seeds.desc: Plant in Fall. Takes 8 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.beet_seeds.desc: Plant in Fall. Takes 6 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.blue_jazz_seeds.desc: Plant in Spring. Takes 7 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.blueberry_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer. Takes 13 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.bok_choy_seeds.desc: Plant in Fall. Takes 4 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.broccoli_seeds.desc: Plant in Fall. Takes 8 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.carrot_seeds.desc: Plant in Spring. Takes 3 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.cauliflower_seeds.desc: Plant in Spring. Takes 12 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.coffee_bean_seeds.desc: Plant in Spring or Summer. Takes 10 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.corn_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer or Fall. Takes 14 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.cranberry_seeds.desc: Plant in Fall. Takes 7 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.eggplant_seeds.desc: Plant in Fall. Takes 5 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.fairy_rose_seeds.desc: Plant in Fall. Takes 12 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.garlic_seeds.desc: Plant in Spring. Takes 4 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.grape_seeds.desc: Plant in Fall. Takes 10 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.green_bean_seeds.desc: Plant in Spring. Takes 10 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.hops_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer. Takes 11 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.hot_pepper_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer. Takes 5 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.kale_seeds.desc: Plant in Spring. Takes 6 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.melon_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer. Takes 12 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.pickaxe.desc: A basic pickaxe. Used to break stones and ores.
item.stardewcraft.copper_pickaxe.desc: A sturdier pickaxe. Used to break stones faster.
item.stardewcraft.steel_pickaxe.desc: An upgraded pickaxe. Used to break tougher rocks.
item.stardewcraft.gold_pickaxe.desc: A high-quality pickaxe. Used to break rocks quickly.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_pickaxe.desc: The finest pickaxe. Used to break rocks the fastest.
item.stardewcraft.poppy_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer. Takes 7 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.potato_seeds.desc: Plant in Spring. Takes 6 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.powder_melon_seeds.des: Plant in Winter. Takes 7 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.pumpkin_seeds.desc: Plant in Fall. Takes 13 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.radish_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer. Takes 6 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.red_cabbage_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer. Takes 9 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.rhubarb_seeds.desc: Plant in Spring. Takes 13 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.starfruit_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer. Takes 13 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.strawberry_seeds.desc: Plant in Spring. Takes 8 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.summer_spangle_seeds.d: Plant in Summer. Takes 8 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.summer_squash_seeds.de: Plant in Summer. Takes 6 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.sunflower_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer or Fall. Takes 8 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.tomato_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer. Takes 11 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.tulip_seeds.desc: Plant in Spring. Takes 6 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.wheat_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer or Fall. Takes 4 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.yam_seeds.desc: Plant in Fall. Takes 10 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.chub.desc: A common freshwater fish found in rivers.
item.stardewcraft.bream.desc: A disgusting fish that eats anything.
item.stardewcraft.smallmouth_bass.desc: A freshwater fish most active during sunset.
item.stardewcraft.catfish.desc: An omnivorous fish that enjoys rainy weather.
item.stardewcraft.shad.desc: Lives in the ocean but swims into freshwater to spawn.
item.stardewcraft.tiger_trout.desc: A rare hybrid between rainbow trout and brown trout.
item.stardewcraft.salmon.desc: Swims upstream in fall to spawn.
item.stardewcraft.walleye.desc: A freshwater fish that enjoys overcast weather.
item.stardewcraft.pike.desc: A freshwater fish whose sharp teeth make it a formidable predator.
item.stardewcraft.largemouth_bass.desc: The most common fish caught in lakes.
item.stardewcraft.bullhead.desc: A scaleless fish that feeds on insect larvae from the lake bottom.
item.stardewcraft.sturgeon.desc: An ancient bottom-feeder with a unique shape that hasn't changed in hundreds of years.
item.stardewcraft.rainbow_trout.desc: A lovely fish with distinctive rainbow coloring.
item.stardewcraft.perch.desc: A freshwater fish most active in winter.
item.stardewcraft.sunfish.desc: Most common on warm sunny days.
item.stardewcraft.lingcod.desc: A fearsome fish with rows of sharp teeth and can swallow prey larger than itself.
item.stardewcraft.midnight_carp.desc: A mysterious fish from the darkness, only appears at night.
item.stardewcraft.woodskip.desc: A very shy fish only found in clear forest ponds.
item.stardewcraft.anchovy.desc: A small ocean fish that swims in schools when young.
item.stardewcraft.red_snapper.desc: A popular fish that lives near coastal regions.
item.stardewcraft.red_mullet.desc: A red ocean fish with long barbels.
item.stardewcraft.sea_cucumber.desc: A strange sea creature that lives on the ocean floor.
item.stardewcraft.super_cucumber.desc: A rare purple variant of the sea cucumber.
item.stardewcraft.flounder.desc: A flat fish that lies on the ocean floor waiting for prey.
item.stardewcraft.halibut.desc: A flat fish that lives on the ocean floor.
item.stardewcraft.eel.desc: A slippery fish where most people can't tell where the tail ends.
item.stardewcraft.octopus.desc: A marine cephalopod known for its intelligence.
item.stardewcraft.squid.desc: A slow-moving cephalopod that uses its tentacles to catch prey.
item.stardewcraft.tilapia.desc: A freshwater fish that mostly lives in tropical climates.
item.stardewcraft.pufferfish.desc: An extremely dangerous ocean fish. Improper preparation can be deadly.
item.stardewcraft.albacore.desc: A relative of the tuna that prefers cooler waters.
item.stardewcraft.sandfish.desc: A strange fish that lives in the dry desert climate.
item.stardewcraft.scorpion_carp.desc: The desert's death angel. Watch for its tail.
item.stardewcraft.ghostfish.desc: A cave fish with almost no color.
item.stardewcraft.stonefish.desc: A fish that lives in underground mine rivers.
item.stardewcraft.ice_pip.desc: A small cold-water fish living in extremely cold waters deep in the mines.
item.stardewcraft.lava_eel.desc: An eel that can survive in extremely high temperatures.
item.stardewcraft.void_salmon.desc: A hollow look in its eyes shows this salmon has seen terrible things.
item.stardewcraft.midnight_squid.desc: A rare squid that lives in the deepest parts of the ocean.
item.stardewcraft.spook_fish.desc: A deep-sea fish whose eyes can look both up and down.
item.stardewcraft.legend.desc: The king of fish. Few have ever seen it.
item.stardewcraft.glacierfish.desc: A legendary fish that lives in arctic waters.
item.stardewcraft.crimsonfish.desc: A legendary red fish that is extremely rare.
item.stardewcraft.angler.desc: A legendary fall fish, rumored to drag fishermen into the water.
item.stardewcraft.mutant_carp.desc: This fish has definitely been exposed to some kind of pollution.
item.stardewcraft.legend_ii.desc: A more powerful descendant of the Legend.
item.stardewcraft.glacierfish_jr.desc: A young descendant of the Glacierfish.
item.stardewcraft.lobster.desc: A large crustacean with sharp claws.
item.stardewcraft.crab.desc: A crustacean that lives in the ocean.
item.stardewcraft.shrimp.desc: A small crustacean commonly used in cooking.
item.stardewcraft.clam.desc: Sometimes pearls can be found inside.
item.stardewcraft.mussel.desc: An edible shellfish often found attached to rocks.
item.stardewcraft.oyster.desc: Creates beautiful pearls within its meaty interior.
item.stardewcraft.crayfish.desc: A small crustacean that lives in freshwater.
item.stardewcraft.seaweed.desc: Can be used to make fertilizer.
item.stardewcraft.white_algae.desc: An extremely rare algae found in the underground waters of the mines.
item.stardewcraft.sea_jelly.desc: A rare jelly found in the ocean.
item.stardewcraft.river_jelly.desc: A rare jelly found in freshwater.
item.stardewcraft.cave_jelly.desc: A rare jelly found in underground lakes.
item.stardewcraft.driftwood.desc: A piece of wood from the sea.
item.stardewcraft.broken_glasses.desc: Someone lost their glasses. The frames are bent and the lenses are all scratched up.
item.stardewcraft.rotten_plant.desc: Decomposing organic material. It's slimy and unpleasant.
item.stardewcraft.rusty_sword.desc: A rusty old sword, but in the darkness of the mines, it's still your most reliable companion.
stardewcraft.weapon.rusty_sword.lore: "A rusty old sword, but in the darkness of the mines, it's still your most reliable companion."
item.stardewcraft.steel_smallsword.desc: A light steel blade suited for quick strikes and precise counters.
item.stardewcraft.carving_knife.desc: A compact dagger built for fast, tight thrusts.
item.stardewcraft.iron_dirk.desc: A short iron dagger made for sudden thrusts and quick repositioning.
item.stardewcraft.wind_spire.desc: A light, swift blade that kicks up wind after a thrust.
item.stardewcraft.elf_blade.desc: A slender dagger that carries a soft forest glow.
item.stardewcraft.burglars_shank.desc: A weapon of choice for the swift and silent.
item.stardewcraft.crystal_dagger.desc: A crystalline dagger that glints with a cold glow.
item.stardewcraft.shadow_dagger.desc: A shadowy dagger that favors finishing weakened foes.
item.stardewcraft.wicked_kris.desc: A serpentine dagger that seeds venom and ends in a burst.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_dagger.desc: A compact rune-forged dagger with a heavy, honest bite.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_needle.desc: A needle-thin iridium dagger that flashes with violet light. Crit damage +200%.
item.stardewcraft.broken_trident.desc: A battered trident that still reels prey in with a tidal bite.
item.stardewcraft.femur.desc: A heavy bone club that favors steady, crushing swings.
item.stardewcraft.wooden_blade.desc: A practice wooden sword that still offers basic protection.
On hit: reduce damage and counterattack
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.carving_thrust: Effect: 3 rapid stabs to nearest target within 2.5 blocks
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.iron_dirk_thru: Effect: Thrust to the nearest target within 7 blocks
Reposition: appear 3 blocks behind the target
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.wind_spire_thr: Effect: Thrust to the nearest target within 6 blocks
On hit: enter Wind Phase for 3s
Wind Phase: +10% crit to basic attacks
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.elf_blade_leaf: On hit: a leaf darts to the target
Effect: Slash a target in front of you
No kill: apply Weak Point II for 3s
Weak Point II: 3s; +5% crit chance per level
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.crystal_dagger: Effect: Thrust and gain 1 Crystal Layer
At 4 stacks: next attack deals bonus damage
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.shadow_dagger_: Effect: Slash a target in front of you
Execute: bonus damage to low HP targets
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.wicked_kris_ve: Effect: Release a venom ring around you
On hit: apply 5 Venom stacks and gain Speed I
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.wicked_kris_ne: Effect: Impale a target and inject Venom
After 3s, detonate remaining Venom in an area
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.fishcatch_thru: Effect: 3 rapid stabs to the nearest target within 2.5 blocks
On hit: if you have any fish, gain Fishcatch
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.tide_reel.desc: Effect: Heavy thrust that reels the target toward you
Effect: On hit, gain a brief blessing
item.stardewcraft.pirate_sword.desc: A curved blade favored by seafaring raiders. Its edge has tasted both blood and gold.
stardewcraft.weapon.pirate_sword.lore: "Fortune favors the bold... and the reckless."
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.desperate_plun: Effect: A reckless strike that costs your blood
Kill: heal; no kill: gain Fury
Effect: Fire a cat projectile in a straight line
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.meowmere_symph: Effect: Consume Energy to fire 5 cats
stardewcraft.weapon.meowmere.lore: "It's glowing, it's meowing... and it's deadly!"
item.stardewcraft.silver_saber.desc: A restrained silver sheen, sharpened for precise counterplay.
item.stardewcraft.cutlass.desc: A short crescent blade that excels at sweeping arcs.
item.stardewcraft.forest_sword.desc: A blade kissed by the woods, answering with a gentle breeze.
item.stardewcraft.iron_edge.desc: A heavy, cold blade that turns impact into a violent rebound.
item.stardewcraft.bone_sword.desc: A pale bone-forged blade that seems to crackle on each swing.
item.stardewcraft.claymore.desc: A heavy double-edged greatsword whose return slash hits hardest.
item.stardewcraft.neptunes_glaive.desc: A tidal greatsword that marks prey and anchors the battlefield.
item.stardewcraft.templars_blade.desc: A holy blade sworn to guard and deliver judgement.
item.stardewcraft.insect_head.desc: A light insect blade that locks in with compound eyes and dashes in bursts.
item.stardewcraft.obsidian_edge.desc: A blade of obsidian that cleaves a single rift line.
item.stardewcraft.ossified_blade.desc: A bone-etched blade that writes a name before execution.
item.stardewcraft.holy_blade.desc: A radiant blade of sacred light that shields the living.
item.stardewcraft.tempered_broadsword.de: A forge-tempered broadsword that bursts with searing heat.
item.stardewcraft.yeti_tooth.desc: A giant tooth from the frozen wilds, cold condensed into its edge.
item.stardewcraft.steel_falchion.desc: A swift steel blade that carves traces into the ground.
item.stardewcraft.dark_sword.desc: A heavy blade that trades blood for power.
item.stardewcraft.lava_katana.desc: A molten katana forged from searing magma.
item.stardewcraft.dragontooth_cutlass.de: A blade wreathed in dragon breath, ready to judge.
item.stardewcraft.dragontooth_shiv.desc: A dragonfang shiv that hunts for the blind spot.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_sword.desc: A heavy dwarven blade etched with runes.
Effect: Slash to apply Bone Fracture
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.claymore_foldb: Damage: 70% + 120%; return hit Off-Balance (-20% Atk Speed, 2s)
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.tide_mark.desc: Marked target takes bonus damage from you
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.tide_anchor.de: Effect: Throw an anchor; landing creates a water-ring AOE
Marked target: teleport to anchor and bind
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.templar_vow.de: Hit taken → riposte; no hit → light slash
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.templar_judgem: Effect: Mark a nearby enemy for Judgement
Transfer 35% damage taken; ends with a verdict slash
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.insect_eye_sta: Effect: Enter stance; next hit guaranteed crit
Hit deals 105% and applies Vulnerable II
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.insect_dash.de: Hit 2 targets to refresh, up to 3 times
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.obsidian_reson: Next basic attack adds bonus damage (if first crits, bonus crits)
Effect: Mark a target with Bone Name (3s)
Crit chance +10%; first crit triggers a bonus hit
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.ossified_execu: Effect: Create a 4-block execution circle under the marked target
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.holy_smite.des: Effect: Holy slash heals on hit
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.holy_domain.de: Effect: Open a sanctuary for 4s with pulses
Pulses deal damage and expand outward
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.tempered_bille: On hit, spawn a sweeping fire ring
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.yeti_tooth_mar: Effect: Apply Frost Fang mark on hit
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.yeti_tooth_spi: Effect: Fire 5 spines across a 120° arc
On hit, slow; if already slowed, freeze 3s
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.steel_falchion: Effect: Carve a 7-block line under the nearest enemy
First enemy to step on it takes DOT
Effect: 5s trace state; carve lines as you move
Lines burst at the end, damaging enemies within 1 block
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.dark_sword_blo: Effect: Spend 6% current HP to unleash a blood slash
Effect: Enter Blood Moon for 4s, attacks +35%
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.lava_katana_br: Effect: Strike to apply Molten Brand and burn
Hits during the mark add Heat stacks
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.lava_katana_re: Effect: If no marked targets, apply a mark first
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.dragon_breath_: Effect: Thrust 5 blocks, piercing enemies on the path
On hit, apply Vulnerable and stagger
Condition: Cast at 15+ Breath stacks; consume all
Bonus: +4% crit chance per stack above 15
Passive: Normal hits build Breath and boost normal damage
Refund: up to 5 Breath on hit
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.dragontooth_sh: Effect: Stab the nearest enemy in front
On hit: target loses AI for 2s
Effect: Enter Dragon Breath for 6s; attacks count as backstab damage
Crit damage: back to base 3.0x (during Breath)
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.dwarf_rune_gua: Effect: Activate runic guard, then slash
On hit, restore Energy and apply Slow
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.dwarf_fortress: Effect: Smash the ground to enter Fortress for 4s
Taking damage triggers tremor waves (up to 4)
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.dwarf_dagger_t: Effect: Thrust forward up to 8 blocks
On hit: gain Energy and apply Weak Point IV
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.dwarf_dagger_r: Effect: Enter Leyline Rush for 5s and gain Speed I
During Rush, thrust hits refresh Thrust cooldown
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.iridium_needle: Passive: Every third hit is guaranteed to crit
Crits restore health/energy and apply Vulnerable II
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.obsidian_crack: Detonates to pull and strike enemies
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.silver_foldbac: Effect: Dash to the nearest enemy within 5 blocks and strike
Foldback: right-click to strike and return
Foldback: lasts 1s; left-click strikes without return
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.crescent_slash: Effect: A wide horizontal sweep in a frontal arc
Hitting any target counts as success
No target: still swings and enters cooldown
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.forest_blessin: Effect: On hit, gain a blessing
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.steel_spine_fu: Effect: Enter a steel-spine stance and store a shock
Next strike releases the stored fury
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.femur_slam.des: Effect: Charge 20 ticks (1s), then slam a 120 deg arc within 3 blocks
On hit: Slow for 2s; single target adds a brief stagger
item.stardewcraft.galaxy_sword.desc: A blade forged from starlight, tracing the galaxy's arc.
item.stardewcraft.infinity_blade.desc: A singularity-forged blade that rends space in black and gold.
item.stardewcraft.galaxy_dagger.desc: A dagger forged from starlight, light enough to leap between shadows.
item.stardewcraft.infinity_dagger.desc: A black-gold dagger that bends space around its edge.
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.galaxy_dagger_: Marked target: next hit triggers 80% follow-up
Effect: Leap behind and strike for 140% damage
Consumes Star Mark for bonus damage
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.infinity_dagge: Marked target: next hit triggers 120% follow-up
Effect: Double backstab for 70% damage each
Consumes Singularity Mark for bonus damage
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.startrail_rift: On hit, refund Startrail, Energy, and HP
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.galaxy_judgeme: Effect: Release a stellar cleave and call starfalls
At 12 Startrail: main cleave guaranteed crit
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.singularity_ev: Effect: Pull enemies within 4 blocks and detonate
Evolved: leave a rift trail after dash
Rift trail: 2s; stepping in deals extra damage
stardewcraft.weapon.skill.eternal_collap: Effect: Create a black hole field for 3.5s and pull
Singularity ≥16: add a final collapse strike
item.stardewcraft.large_egg_white.desc: It's an uncommonly large white egg!
item.stardewcraft.large_egg_brown.desc: It's an uncommonly large brown egg!
item.stardewcraft.void_egg.desc: A jet-black egg with red flecks. It's warm to the touch.
item.stardewcraft.golden_egg.desc: A very rare and special egg with a solid gold shell.
item.stardewcraft.ostrich_egg.desc: It may be the world's largest egg.
item.stardewcraft.large_milk.desc: A large jug of cow's milk.
item.stardewcraft.large_goat_milk.desc: A gallon of creamy goat's milk.
item.stardewcraft.truffle.desc: A gourmet type of mushroom with a unique taste.
item.stardewcraft.goat_cheese.desc: Soft cheese made from goat's milk.
item.stardewcraft.void_mayonnaise.desc: A thick, black paste that smells like burnt hair.
item.stardewcraft.cloth.desc: A bolt of fine wool cloth.
item.stardewcraft.raisins.desc: It's said to be the Junimos' favorite food.
item.stardewcraft.red_mushroom.desc: A spotted mushroom sometimes found in caves.
item.stardewcraft.purple_mushroom.desc: A rare mushroom found deep in caves.
item.stardewcraft.morel.desc: Sought after for its unique nutty flavor.
item.stardewcraft.chanterelle.desc: A tasty mushroom with a fruity smell and slightly peppery flavor.
item.stardewcraft.magma_cap.desc: A very rare mushroom that lives next to pools of lava.
item.stardewcraft.dinosaur_mayonnaise.de: It's thick and creamy, with a vivid green hue. It smells like grass and leather.
item.stardewcraft.pickles.desc: A jar of your home-made pickles.
item.stardewcraft.roe.desc: Fresh fish eggs. These can be aged in a preserves jar to bring out more flavor.
item.stardewcraft.aged_roe.desc: Fish eggs aged in salt to bring out the flavor.
item.stardewcraft.caviar.desc: The cured roe of a sturgeon fish. Considered to be a luxurious delicacy!
